property.name: userMode
property.label: User Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Admin, Student.

property.name: modalTitle
property.label: Modal Title
property.description: Component modal title.

property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Modal Icon Name
property.description: Component modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: ipwButtonLabelPrefix
property.label: Individual Pathway Button Label Prefix
property.description: Individual Pathway Button Label Prefix. E.g. T - {0}. The {0} will be replaced by the Term #.

property.name: individualEnrollmentTabLabel
property.label: Unit Enrollment Tab Label
property.description: Unit enrollment tab label.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentTabLabel
property.label: Session Enrollment Tab Label
property.description: Session enrollment tab label.

property.name: individualEnrollmentHelptext
property.label: Unit Enrollment Help/Instruction Text
property.default: You can use the filter on the right to filter the units. To enroll to a unit, click on the "Enroll" button next to a unit.
property.description: Unit enrollment help or instruction text.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentHelptext
property.label: Session Enrollment Help/Instruction Text
property.default: To enroll to a study unit, you need to enroll to at least one unit.
property.description: Session enrollment help or instruction text.

property.name: individualPathwayInfoFields
property.label: Individual Pathway Highlights Panel Fields
property.description: Hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: individualPathwayInfoColumnNo
property.label: Individual Pathway Highlights Panel Column Number
property.description: The number of fields to be displayed in a row e.g., 2 will allow two fields to display in a row. Supported options are: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, and 12.

property.name: individualAcademicProgressInfoFields
property.label: Individual Academic Progress Highlights Panel Fields
property.description: Hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: individualAcademicProgressInfoColumnNo
property.label: Individual Academic Progress Highlights Panel Column Number
property.description: The number of fields to be displayed in a row e.g., 2 will allow two fields to display in a row. Supported options are: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, and 12.

property.name: ipeTitleField
property.label: Individual Program Enrollment Title Field
property.description: The individual program enrollment field API name to be displayed as the title e.g., Field_A__c or Field_A__r.Parent_Field__c.

property.name: ipsGroupTitleField
property.label: Individual Plan Structure Group Title Field
property.description: The individual plan structure field API name to be displayed as the title for group e.g., Field_A__c or Field_A__r.Parent_Field__c.

property.name: showIpsGroupInfo
property.label: Show Individual Plan Structure Group Panel
property.description: Show individual plan structure group record info panel.

property.name: ipsGroupInfoFields
property.label: Individual Plan Structure Group Panel Fields
property.description: Hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: ipsGroupInfoColumnNo
property.label: Individual Plan Structure Group Panel Column Number
property.description: The number of fields to be displayed in a row e.g., 2 will allow two fields to display in a row. Supported options are: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, and 12.

property.name: ipsUnitTableFields
property.label: Individual Plan Structure Unit Table Fields
property.description: The fields to be displayed in the unit tables in semi-colon separated value in the [objectName].[fieldName] format e.g., reduivy__Study_Unit__c.Field_A__c;reduivy__Study_Plan_Structure__c.Field_B__c,reduivy__Study_Plan_Structure__c.Field_C__r.Parent__c. The supported objects are: reduivy__Study_Plan_Structure__c, reduivy__Study_Unit__c, reduivy__Study_Offering__c.

property.name: accordionBackgroundColor
property.label: Group Accordion Background Color
property.description: The individual plan structure group accordion backgound color in hex code. e.g., #cccccc.

property.name: accordionTextColor
property.label: Group Accordion Text Color
property.description: The individual plan structure group accordion text color in hex code. e.g., #000000.

property.name: studyUnitInfoFields
property.label: Unit Info - Study Unit Fields
property.description: The study unit fields for the unit info in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: studyOfferingInfoFields
property.label: Unit Info - Study Offering Fields
property.description: The study offering fields for the unit info in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: studyPlanStructureUnitInfoFields
property.label: Unit Info - Study Plan Structure Fields
property.description: The study plan structure fields for the unit info in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: showEnrollmentButtons
property.label: Show Enrollment Buttons
property.description: Show enrollment action buttons.

property.name: preEnrollButtonIconName
property.label: Button Icon Name - Pre-Enroll
property.description: Button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: preEnrollButtonLabel
property.label: Button Label - Pre-Enroll
property.description: Button label.

property.name: preEnrollEnrollmentStatus
property.label: Enrollment Status - Pre-Enroll
property.description: Individual Enrollment Status after pre-enroll into Study Offering.

property.name: withdrawPreEnrollButtonIconName
property.label: Button Icon Name - Withdraw from Pre-Enroll
property.description: Button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: withdrawPreEnrollButtonLabel
property.label: Button Label - Withdraw from Pre-Enroll
property.description: Button label.

property.name: withdrawPreEnrollEnrollmentStatus
property.label: Enrollment Status - Withdraw Pre-Enroll
property.description: Individual Enrollment Status after withdrawing pre-enroll from Study Offering.

property.name: enrollButtonIconName
property.label: Button Icon Name - Enroll
property.description: Button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: enrollButtonLabel
property.label: Button Label - Enroll
property.description: Button label.

property.name: enrollEnrollmentStatus
property.label: Enrollment Status - Enroll
property.description: Individual Enrollment Status after enrolling to Study Offering.

property.name: unenrollButtonIconName
property.label: Button Icon Name - Unenroll
property.description: Button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: unenrollButtonLabel
property.label: Button Label - Unenroll
property.description: Button label.

property.name: unenrollEnrollmentStatus
property.label: Enrollment Status - Unenroll
property.description: Individual Enrollment Status after unenrolling from Study Offering.

property.name: unenrollRequestButtonIconName
property.label: Button Icon Name - Request Unenroll
property.description: Button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: unenrollRequestButtonLabel
property.label: Button Label - Request Unenroll
property.description: Button label.

property.name: unenrollRequestEnrollmentStatus
property.label: Enrollment Status - Unenroll Request
property.description: Individual Enrollment Status after requesting unenrollment from Study Offering.

property.name: waitlistButtonIconName
property.label: Button Icon Name - Join Waitlist
property.description: Button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: waitlistButtonLabel
property.label: Button Label - Join Waitlist
property.description: Button label.

property.name: waitlistEnrollmentStatus
property.label: Enrollment Status - Waitlist
property.description: Individual Enrollment Status after joining waitlist of Study Offering.

property.name: withdrawWaitlistButtonIconName
property.label: Button Icon Name - Withdraw from Waitlist
property.description: Button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: withdrawWaitlistButtonLabel
property.label: Button Label - Withdraw from Waitlist
property.description: Button label.

property.name: withdrawWaitlistEnrollmentStatus
property.label: Enrollment Status - Withdraw Waitlist
property.description: Individual Enrollment Status after withdrawing waitlist from Study Offering.

property.name: childIpeEnrollmentButtonIconName
property.label: Child Individual Program Enrollment Button Icon Name
property.description: Child individual program enrollment button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: showChildIpeEnrollmentButton
property.label: Show Child Individual Program Enrollment Button
property.description: Show the child individual program enrollment button to allow user to enroll into or unenroll from child program.

property.name: addPathwayButtonIconName
property.label: Add Pathway Button Icon Name
property.description: Add pathway button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: showNewPathwayButton
property.label: Show New Pathway Button
property.description: Show the new pathway button to add new pathway.

property.name: showStudyUnitQuickSearch
property.label: Show Study Unit Quick Search
property.description: Show the search box to search for Study Unit name or Study Unit code.

property.name: showUnitListingOption
property.label: Show View Study Units Option
property.description: Show the view study units option to allow user to switch the unit listing.

property.name: defaultUnitListingMode
property.label: Default View Study Units Mode
property.description: Show the view study units option. Supported options are: All Study Units,Recommended Pathway.

property.name: showCampusOptions
property.label: Show Campus Option
property.description: Show the campus option to allow user to filter by campus.

property.name: missedFailedUnitListingOption
property.label: Missed/Failed Units Listing Option
property.description: Show missed or failed study units from the previous academic term. Supported options are: All, None.

property.name: customFilter1Active
property.label: Custom Filter 1 - Active
property.description: Activate custom filter 1.

property.name: customFilter1Visible
property.label: Custom Filter 1 - Visible
property.description: Display custom filter 1.

property.name: customFilter1Label
property.label: Custom Filter 1 - Label
property.description: Label for custom filter 1.

property.name: customFilter1Mapping
property.label: Custom Filter 1 - Mapping
property.description: Mapping between Individual Program Enrollment and Study Offering for custom filter 1 e.g., reduivy__IPE_Field__c=reduivy__SOF_Field__c.

property.name: customFilter2Active
property.label: Custom Filter 2 - Active
property.description: Activate custom filter 2.

property.name: customFilter2Visible
property.label: Custom Filter 2 - Visible
property.description: Display custom filter 2.

property.name: customFilter2Label
property.label: Custom Filter 2 - Label
property.description: Label for custom filter 2.

property.name: customFilter2Mapping
property.label: Custom Filter 2 - Mapping
property.description: Mapping between Individual Program Enrollment and Study Offering for custom filter 2 e.g., reduivy__IPE_Field__c=reduivy__SOF_Field__c.

property.name: customFilter3Active
property.label: Custom Filter 3 - Active
property.description: Activate custom filter 3.

property.name: customFilter3Visible
property.label: Custom Filter 3 - Visible
property.description: Display custom filter 3.

property.name: customFilter3Label
property.label: Custom Filter 3 - Label
property.description: Label for custom filter 3.

property.name: customFilter3Mapping
property.label: Custom Filter 3 - Mapping
property.description: Mapping between Individual Program Enrollment and Study Offering for custom filter 3 e.g., reduivy__IPE_Field__c=reduivy__SOF_Field__c.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentSofAccordionBackgroundColor
property.label: Session Enrollment - Study Offering Accordion Background Color
property.description: The study offering accordion backgound color for session enrollment in hex code. e.g., #cccccc.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentSofAccordionTextColor
property.label: Session Enrollment - Study Offering Accordion Text Color
property.description: The study offering accordion text color for session enrollment in hex code. e.g., #000000.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentSofTitleField
property.label: Session Enrollment - Study Offering Title Field
property.description: The study offering field API name to be displayed as the title for study offering accordion e.g., Field_A__c or Field_A__r.Parent_Field__c.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentSofInfoFields
property.label: Session Enrollment - Study Offering Fields
property.description: The study offering fields for session enrollment in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentSseTitleField
property.label: Session Enrollment - Study Session Title Field
property.description: The study session field API name to be displayed as the title for study session section e.g., Field_A__c or Field_A__r.Parent_Field__c.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentSseInfoFields
property.label: Session Enrollment - Study Session Fields
property.description: The study session fields for session enrollment in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentSseIcon
property.label: Session Enrollment - Study Session Icon Name
property.description: Study session button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentSstTitleField
property.label: Session Enrollment - Study Session Time Title Field
property.description: The study session time field API name to be displayed as the title for study session time section e.g., Field_A__c or Field_A__r.Parent_Field__c.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentSstInfoFields
property.label: Session Enrollment - Study Session Time Fields
property.description: The study session time fields for session enrollment in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentSstIcon
property.label: Session Enrollment - Study Session Time Icon Name
property.description: Study session time button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentShowSstFieldLabel
property.label: Session Enrollment - Show Study Session Time Fields Label
property.description: Show study session time record info label.

property.name: showMyCalendarButton
property.label: Show My Calendar Button
property.description: Show my calendar button.

property.name: myCalendarButtonIconName
property.label: My Calendar Button Icon Name
property.description: My calendar button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: myCalendarModalTitle
property.label: My Calendar - Modal Title
property.description: My calendar modal title.

property.name: myCalendarModalIconName
property.label: My Calendar - Modal Icon Name
property.description: My calendar modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: myCalendarTimelineMinTime
property.label: My Calendar - Calendar First Hour
property.description: Determines the first hour/time that will be displayed in my calendar, even when the scrollbars have been scrolled all the way up. e.g., 09:00 = 9AM.

property.name: myCalendarTimelineMaxTime
property.label: My Calendar - Calendar Last Hour
property.description: Determines the last hour/time (exclusively) that will be displayed in my calendar, even when the scrollbars have been scrolled all the way down. e.g., 17:00 = 5PM.

property.name: myCalendarView
property.label: My Calendar - Calendar Default View
property.description: The default view of calendar. The supported options are: timeGridDay, timeGridWeek, dayGridMonth and listWeek.

property.name: myCalendarEnrollmentStatuses
property.label: My Calendar - Individual Session Enrollment Statuses
property.description: The individual session enrollment's enrollment status API value to be considered in my calendar in semi-colon separated value e.g., Enrolled;Completed.

property.name: myCalendarHeaderButtonLeft
property.label: My Calendar - Calendar Top Left
property.description: My calendar buttons or title to show at top left in comma separated value e.g., timeGridDay,timeGridWeek. Supported options are: timeGridDay, timeGridWeek, dayGridMonth, listWeek, title, today, prev, and next.

property.name: myCalendarHeaderButtonCenter
property.label: My Calendar - Calendar Top Center
property.description: My calendar buttons or title to show at top center in comma separated value e.g., title. Supported options are: timeGridDay, timeGridWeek, dayGridMonth, listWeek, title, today, prev, and next.

property.name: myCalendarHeaderButtonRight
property.label: My Calendar - Calendar Top Right
property.description: My calendar buttons or title to show at top right in comma separated value e.g., today,prev,next. Supported options are: timeGridDay, timeGridWeek, dayGridMonth, listWeek, title, today, prev, and next.

property.name: myCalendarStudySessionInfoFields
property.label: My Calendar - Study Session Info Fields
property.description: My calendar study session fields for the event info in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: myCalendarStudySessionTimeInfoFields
property.label: My Calendar - Study Session Time Info Fields
property.description: My calendar study session time fields for the event info in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: myCalendarStudyEventInfoFields
property.label: My Calendar - Study Event Info Fields
property.description: My calendar study event fields for the event info in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: myCalendarUseIsoWeek
property.label: My Calendar - Use ISO Week
property.description: To enable ISO week in my calendar, which starting weeks on Monday.

property.name: showStudyPathwayButton
property.label: Show Study Pathway Button
property.description: Show study pathway button.

property.name: studyPathwayButtonIconName
property.label: Study Pathway Button Icon Name
property.description: Study pathway button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: studyPathwayAccordionBackgroundColor
property.label: Study Pathway - Accordion Background Color
property.description: The study pathway term accordion background color in hex code. e.g., #cccccc.

property.name: studyPathwayAccordionTextColor
property.label: Study Pathway - Accordion Text Color
property.description: The study pathway term accordion text color in hex code. e.g., #000000.

property.name: studyPathwayInfoFields
property.label: Study Pathway - Study Pathway Highlights Panel Fields
property.description: Study pathway hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: studyPathwayTermTitlePrefix
property.label: Study Pathway - Study Pathway Term Title Prefix
property.description: Study pathway term prefix for the accordion title.

property.name: studyPathwayTermInfoFields
property.label: Study Pathway - Study Pathway Term Highlights Panel Fields
property.description: Study pathway term hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: studyPathwayUnitTitleField
property.label: Study Pathway Unit Highlights Title Field
property.description: The Study Unit field API name to be displayed as the title for group e.g., Field_A__c.

property.name: studyPathwayUnitInfoFields
property.label: Study Pathway - Study Pathway Unit Highlights Panel Fields
property.description: Study pathway unit ightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: studyPathwayUnitIcon
property.label: Study Pathway - Study Pathway Unit Icon Name
property.description: Study pathway unit icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: studyPathwayGroupTitleField
property.label: Study Pathway Group Highlights Title Field
property.description: The Study Plan Structure (Group) field API name to be displayed as the title for group e.g., Field_A__c.

property.name: studyPathwayGroupInfoFields
property.label: Study Pathway - Study Pathway Group Highlights Panel Fields
property.description: Study pathway group hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: studyPathwayGroupIcon
property.label: Study Pathway - Study Pathway Group Icon Name
property.description: Study pathway group icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: studyPathwayComboboxLabel
property.label: Study Pathway - Preview With Combobox Label
property.description: Study pathway combobox label.

property.name: studyPathwayShowStudyUnitQuickSearch
property.label: Study Pathway - Show Study Unit Quick Search
property.description: Study Pathway Show Study Unit Quick Search.

property.name: studyPathwayShowStudyPlanOptions
property.label: Study Pathway - Show Study Plan Options
property.description: Study pathway modal to show study plan options combobox.

property.name: showChangeStudyPathwayButton
property.label: Show Change Study Pathway Button
property.description: Show change study pathway button.

property.name: showLockingButton
property.label: Show Locking/Unlocking Button
property.description: Show Locking/Unlocking button.

property.name: showWithdrawFromTermButton
property.label: Show Withdraw From Term Button
property.description: Show Withdraw From Term button.

property.name: withdrawFromTermIenStatusesForWithdrawal
property.label: Withdraw From Term - Individual Enrollment Status for Withdrawal
property.description: The Individual Enrollment Status to be considered for withdrawal in semi-colon separated value e.g., Enrolled;Enrollment Requested;Withdrawal Requested.

property.name: showEnrollmentFinalizationButton
property.label: Show Enrollment Finalization Button
property.description: Show enrollment finalization button.

property.name: enrollmentFinalizationMode
property.label: Enrollment Finalization Mode
property.description: Use custom screen flow or custom LWC component to handle the enrollment finalization. Supported options are: Launch Flow, Dispatch LWC Event.

property.name: enrollmentFinalizationFlowName
property.label: Enrollment Finalization Flow Name
property.description: The API name for the screen flow to handle the enrollment finalization.

property.name: requestAttemptMax
property.label: Retry Attempt
property.description: The maximum retry attempt for enrollment request.

property.name: requestAttemptWaitingTime
property.label: Retry Waiting Time (Sec)
property.description: The incremental time for each retry attempt in seconds.

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.

property.name: requirementDescriptionField
property.label: (Obsolete) Requirement Description Field
property.description: This is obsolete.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: ID of the salesforce record for which the record details are to be displayed e.g. {!recordId}

property.name: userMode
property.label: User Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Admin, Student.

property.name: modalTitle
property.label: Modal Title
property.description: Component modal title.

property.name: modalIconName
property.label: Modal Icon Name
property.description: Component modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: ipwButtonLabelPrefix
property.label: Individual Pathway Button Label Prefix
property.description: Individual Pathway Button Label Prefix. E.g. T - {0}. The {0} will be replaced by the Term #.

property.name: individualEnrollmentTabLabel
property.label: Unit Enrollment Tab Label
property.description: Unit enrollment tab label.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentTabLabel
property.label: Session Enrollment Tab Label
property.description: Session enrollment tab label.

property.name: individualEnrollmentHelptext
property.label: Unit Enrollment Help/Instruction Text
property.default: You can use the filter on the right to filter the units. To enroll to a unit, click on the "Enroll" button next to a unit.
property.description: Unit enrollment help or instruction text.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentHelptext
property.label: Session Enrollment Help/Instruction Text
property.default: To enroll to a study unit, you need to enroll to at least one unit.
property.description: Session enrollment help or instruction text.

property.name: individualPathwayInfoFields
property.label: Individual Pathway Highlights Panel Fields
property.description: Hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: individualPathwayInfoColumnNo
property.label: Individual Pathway Highlights Panel Column Number
property.description: The number of fields to be displayed in a row e.g., 2 will allow two fields to display in a row. Supported options are: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, and 12.

property.name: individualAcademicProgressInfoFields
property.label: Individual Academic Progress Highlights Panel Fields
property.description: Hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: individualAcademicProgressInfoColumnNo
property.label: Individual Academic Progress Highlights Panel Column Number
property.description: The number of fields to be displayed in a row e.g., 2 will allow two fields to display in a row. Supported options are: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, and 12.

property.name: ipeTitleField
property.label: Individual Program Enrollment Title Field
property.description: The individual program enrollment field API name to be displayed as the title e.g., Field_A__c or Field_A__r.Parent_Field__c.

property.name: ipsGroupTitleField
property.label: Individual Plan Structure Group Title Field
property.description: The individual plan structure field API name to be displayed as the title for group e.g., Field_A__c or Field_A__r.Parent_Field__c.

property.name: showIpsGroupInfo
property.label: Show Individual Plan Structure Group Panel
property.description: Show individual plan structure group record info panel.

property.name: ipsGroupInfoFields
property.label: Individual Plan Structure Group Panel Fields
property.description: Hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: ipsGroupInfoColumnNo
property.label: Individual Plan Structure Group Panel Column Number
property.description: The number of fields to be displayed in a row e.g., 2 will allow two fields to display in a row. Supported options are: 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, and 12.

property.name: ipsUnitTableFields
property.label: Individual Plan Structure Unit Table Fields
property.description: The fields to be displayed in the unit tables in semi-colon separated value in the [objectName].[fieldName] format e.g., reduivy__Study_Unit__c.Field_A__c;reduivy__Study_Plan_Structure__c.Field_B__c,reduivy__Study_Plan_Structure__c.Field_C__r.Parent__c. The supported objects are: reduivy__Study_Plan_Structure__c, reduivy__Study_Unit__c, reduivy__Study_Offering__c.

property.name: accordionBackgroundColor
property.label: Group Accordion Background Color
property.description: The individual plan structure group accordion backgound color in hex code. e.g., #cccccc.

property.name: accordionTextColor
property.label: Group Accordion Text Color
property.description: The individual plan structure group accordion text color in hex code. e.g., #000000.

property.name: studyUnitInfoFields
property.label: Unit Info - Study Unit Fields
property.description: The study unit fields for the unit info in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: studyOfferingInfoFields
property.label: Unit Info - Study Offering Fields
property.description: The study offering fields for the unit info in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: studyPlanStructureUnitInfoFields
property.label: Unit Info - Study Plan Structure Fields
property.description: The study plan structure fields for the unit info in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: showEnrollmentButtons
property.label: Show Enrollment Buttons
property.description: Show enrollment action buttons.

property.name: preEnrollButtonIconName
property.label: Button Icon Name - Pre-Enroll
property.description: Button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: preEnrollButtonLabel
property.label: Button Label - Pre-Enroll
property.description: Button label.

property.name: preEnrollEnrollmentStatus
property.label: Enrollment Status - Pre-Enroll
property.description: Individual Enrollment Status after pre-enroll into Study Offering.

property.name: withdrawPreEnrollButtonIconName
property.label: Button Icon Name - Withdraw from Pre-Enroll
property.description: Button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: withdrawPreEnrollButtonLabel
property.label: Button Label - Withdraw from Pre-Enroll
property.description: Button label.

property.name: withdrawPreEnrollEnrollmentStatus
property.label: Enrollment Status - Withdraw Pre-Enroll
property.description: Individual Enrollment Status after withdrawing pre-enroll from Study Offering.

property.name: enrollButtonIconName
property.label: Button Icon Name - Enroll
property.description: Button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: enrollButtonLabel
property.label: Button Label - Enroll
property.description: Button label.

property.name: enrollEnrollmentStatus
property.label: Enrollment Status - Enroll
property.description: Individual Enrollment Status after enrolling to Study Offering.

property.name: unenrollButtonIconName
property.label: Button Icon Name - Unenroll
property.description: Button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: unenrollButtonLabel
property.label: Button Label - Unenroll
property.description: Button label.

property.name: unenrollEnrollmentStatus
property.label: Enrollment Status - Unenroll
property.description: Individual Enrollment Status after unenrolling from Study Offering.

property.name: unenrollRequestButtonIconName
property.label: Button Icon Name - Request Unenroll
property.description: Button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: unenrollRequestButtonLabel
property.label: Button Label - Request Unenroll
property.description: Button label.

property.name: unenrollRequestEnrollmentStatus
property.label: Enrollment Status - Unenroll Request
property.description: Individual Enrollment Status after requesting unenrollment from Study Offering.

property.name: waitlistButtonIconName
property.label: Button Icon Name - Join Waitlist
property.description: Button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: waitlistButtonLabel
property.label: Button Label - Join Waitlist
property.description: Button label.

property.name: waitlistEnrollmentStatus
property.label: Enrollment Status - Waitlist
property.description: Individual Enrollment Status after joining waitlist of Study Offering.

property.name: withdrawWaitlistButtonIconName
property.label: Button Icon Name - Withdraw from Waitlist
property.description: Button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: withdrawWaitlistButtonLabel
property.label: Button Label - Withdraw from Waitlist
property.description: Button label.

property.name: withdrawWaitlistEnrollmentStatus
property.label: Enrollment Status - Withdraw Waitlist
property.description: Individual Enrollment Status after withdrawing waitlist from Study Offering.

property.name: childIpeEnrollmentButtonIconName
property.label: Child Individual Program Enrollment Button Icon Name
property.description: Child individual program enrollment button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: showChildIpeEnrollmentButton
property.label: Show Child Individual Program Enrollment Button
property.description: Show the child individual program enrollment button to allow user to enroll into or unenroll from child program.

property.name: addPathwayButtonIconName
property.label: Add Pathway Button Icon Name
property.description: Add pathway button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: showNewPathwayButton
property.label: Show New Pathway Button
property.description: Show the new pathway button to add new pathway.

property.name: showStudyUnitQuickSearch
property.label: Show Study Unit Quick Search
property.description: Show the search box to search for Study Unit name or Study Unit code.

property.name: showUnitListingOption
property.label: Show View Study Units Option
property.description: Show the view study units option to allow user to switch the unit listing.

property.name: defaultUnitListingMode
property.label: Default View Study Units Mode
property.description: Show the view study units option. Supported options are: All Study Units,Recommended Pathway.

property.name: showCampusOptions
property.label: Show Campus Option
property.description: Show the campus option to allow user to filter by campus.

property.name: missedFailedUnitListingOption
property.label: Missed/Failed Units Listing Option
property.description: Show missed or failed study units from the previous academic term. Supported options are: All, None.

property.name: customFilter1Active
property.label: Custom Filter 1 - Active
property.description: Activate custom filter 1.

property.name: customFilter1Visible
property.label: Custom Filter 1 - Visible
property.description: Display custom filter 1.

property.name: customFilter1Label
property.label: Custom Filter 1 - Label
property.description: Label for custom filter 1.

property.name: customFilter1Mapping
property.label: Custom Filter 1 - Mapping
property.description: Mapping between Individual Program Enrollment and Study Offering for custom filter 1 e.g., reduivy__IPE_Field__c=reduivy__SOF_Field__c.

property.name: customFilter2Active
property.label: Custom Filter 2 - Active
property.description: Activate custom filter 2.

property.name: customFilter2Visible
property.label: Custom Filter 2 - Visible
property.description: Display custom filter 2.

property.name: customFilter2Label
property.label: Custom Filter 2 - Label
property.description: Label for custom filter 2.

property.name: customFilter2Mapping
property.label: Custom Filter 2 - Mapping
property.description: Mapping between Individual Program Enrollment and Study Offering for custom filter 2 e.g., reduivy__IPE_Field__c=reduivy__SOF_Field__c.

property.name: customFilter3Active
property.label: Custom Filter 3 - Active
property.description: Activate custom filter 3.

property.name: customFilter3Visible
property.label: Custom Filter 3 - Visible
property.description: Display custom filter 3.

property.name: customFilter3Label
property.label: Custom Filter 3 - Label
property.description: Label for custom filter 3.

property.name: customFilter3Mapping
property.label: Custom Filter 3 - Mapping
property.description: Mapping between Individual Program Enrollment and Study Offering for custom filter 3 e.g., reduivy__IPE_Field__c=reduivy__SOF_Field__c.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentSofAccordionBackgroundColor
property.label: Session Enrollment - Study Offering Accordion Background Color
property.description: The study offering accordion backgound color for session enrollment in hex code. e.g., #cccccc.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentSofAccordionTextColor
property.label: Session Enrollment - Study Offering Accordion Text Color
property.description: The study offering accordion text color for session enrollment in hex code. e.g., #000000.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentSofTitleField
property.label: Session Enrollment - Study Offering Title Field
property.description: The study offering field API name to be displayed as the title for study offering accordion e.g., Field_A__c or Field_A__r.Parent_Field__c.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentSofInfoFields
property.label: Session Enrollment - Study Offering Fields
property.description: The study offering fields for session enrollment in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentSseTitleField
property.label: Session Enrollment - Study Session Title Field
property.description: The study session field API name to be displayed as the title for study session section e.g., Field_A__c or Field_A__r.Parent_Field__c.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentSseInfoFields
property.label: Session Enrollment - Study Session Fields
property.description: The study session fields for session enrollment in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentSseIcon
property.label: Session Enrollment - Study Session Icon Name
property.description: Study session button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentSstTitleField
property.label: Session Enrollment - Study Session Time Title Field
property.description: The study session time field API name to be displayed as the title for study session time section e.g., Field_A__c or Field_A__r.Parent_Field__c.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentSstInfoFields
property.label: Session Enrollment - Study Session Time Fields
property.description: The study session time fields for session enrollment in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentSstIcon
property.label: Session Enrollment - Study Session Time Icon Name
property.description: Study session time button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: sessionEnrollmentShowSstFieldLabel
property.label: Session Enrollment - Show Study Session Time Fields Label
property.description: Show study session time record info label.

property.name: showMyCalendarButton
property.label: Show My Calendar Button
property.description: Show my calendar button.

property.name: myCalendarButtonIconName
property.label: My Calendar Button Icon Name
property.description: My calendar button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: myCalendarModalTitle
property.label: My Calendar - Modal Title
property.description: My calendar modal title.

property.name: myCalendarModalIconName
property.label: My Calendar - Modal Icon Name
property.description: My calendar modal icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: myCalendarTimelineMinTime
property.label: My Calendar - Calendar First Hour
property.description: Determines the first hour/time that will be displayed in my calendar, even when the scrollbars have been scrolled all the way up. e.g., 09:00 = 9AM.

property.name: myCalendarTimelineMaxTime
property.label: My Calendar - Calendar Last Hour
property.description: Determines the last hour/time (exclusively) that will be displayed in my calendar, even when the scrollbars have been scrolled all the way down. e.g., 17:00 = 5PM.

property.name: myCalendarView
property.label: My Calendar - Calendar Default View
property.description: The default view of calendar. The supported options are: timeGridDay, timeGridWeek, dayGridMonth and listWeek.

property.name: myCalendarEnrollmentStatuses
property.label: My Calendar - Individual Session Enrollment Statuses
property.description: The individual session enrollment's enrollment status API value to be considered in my calendar in semi-colon separated value e.g., Enrolled;Completed.

property.name: myCalendarHeaderButtonLeft
property.label: My Calendar - Calendar Top Left
property.description: My calendar buttons or title to show at top left in comma separated value e.g., timeGridDay,timeGridWeek. Supported options are: timeGridDay, timeGridWeek, dayGridMonth, listWeek, title, today, prev, and next.

property.name: myCalendarHeaderButtonCenter
property.label: My Calendar - Calendar Top Center
property.description: My calendar buttons or title to show at top center in comma separated value e.g., title. Supported options are: timeGridDay, timeGridWeek, dayGridMonth, listWeek, title, today, prev, and next.

property.name: myCalendarHeaderButtonRight
property.label: My Calendar - Calendar Top Right
property.description: My calendar buttons or title to show at top right in comma separated value e.g., today,prev,next. Supported options are: timeGridDay, timeGridWeek, dayGridMonth, listWeek, title, today, prev, and next.

property.name: myCalendarStudySessionInfoFields
property.label: My Calendar - Study Session Info Fields
property.description: My calendar study session fields for the event info in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: myCalendarStudySessionTimeInfoFields
property.label: My Calendar - Study Session Time Info Fields
property.description: My calendar study session time fields for the event info in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: myCalendarStudyEventInfoFields
property.label: My Calendar - Study Event Info Fields
property.description: My calendar study event fields for the event info in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c. Note that parent fields are not supported.

property.name: myCalendarUseIsoWeek
property.label: My Calendar - Use ISO Week
property.description: To enable ISO week in my calendar, which starting weeks on Monday.

property.name: showStudyPathwayButton
property.label: Show Study Pathway Button
property.description: Show study pathway button.

property.name: studyPathwayButtonIconName
property.label: Study Pathway Button Icon Name
property.description: Study pathway button icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: studyPathwayAccordionBackgroundColor
property.label: Study Pathway - Accordion Background Color
property.description: The study pathway term accordion background color in hex code. e.g., #cccccc.

property.name: studyPathwayAccordionTextColor
property.label: Study Pathway - Accordion Text Color
property.description: The study pathway term accordion text color in hex code. e.g., #000000.

property.name: studyPathwayInfoFields
property.label: Study Pathway - Study Pathway Highlights Panel Fields
property.description: Study pathway hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: studyPathwayTermTitlePrefix
property.label: Study Pathway - Study Pathway Term Title Prefix
property.description: Study pathway term prefix for the accordion title.

property.name: studyPathwayTermInfoFields
property.label: Study Pathway - Study Pathway Term Highlights Panel Fields
property.description: Study pathway term hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: studyPathwayUnitTitleField
property.label: Study Pathway Unit Highlights Title Field
property.description: The Study Unit field API name to be displayed as the title for group e.g., Field_A__c.

property.name: studyPathwayUnitInfoFields
property.label: Study Pathway - Study Pathway Unit Highlights Panel Fields
property.description: Study pathway unit ightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: studyPathwayUnitIcon
property.label: Study Pathway - Study Pathway Unit Icon Name
property.description: Study pathway unit icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: studyPathwayGroupTitleField
property.label: Study Pathway Group Highlights Title Field
property.description: The Study Plan Structure (Group) field API name to be displayed as the title for group e.g., Field_A__c.

property.name: studyPathwayGroupInfoFields
property.label: Study Pathway - Study Pathway Group Highlights Panel Fields
property.description: Study pathway group hightlights panel fields in semi-colon separated value e.g., Field_A__c;Field_B__c;Field_C__c.

property.name: studyPathwayGroupIcon
property.label: Study Pathway - Study Pathway Group Icon Name
property.description: Study pathway group icon name. Please refer to https://www.lightningdesignsystem.com/icons/ for the supported icons.

property.name: studyPathwayComboboxLabel
property.label: Study Pathway - Preview With Combobox Label
property.description: Study pathway combobox label.

property.name: studyPathwayShowStudyUnitQuickSearch
property.label: Study Pathway - Show Study Unit Quick Search
property.description: Study Pathway Show Study Unit Quick Search.

property.name: studyPathwayShowStudyPlanOptions
property.label: Study Pathway - Show Study Plan Options
property.description: Study pathway modal to show study plan options combobox.

property.name: showChangeStudyPathwayButton
property.label: Show Change Study Pathway Button
property.description: Show change study pathway button.

property.name: showLockingButton
property.label: Show Locking/Unlocking Button
property.description: Show Locking/Unlocking button.

property.name: showWithdrawFromTermButton
property.label: Show Withdraw From Term Button
property.description: Show Withdraw From Term button.

property.name: withdrawFromTermIenStatusesForWithdrawal
property.label: Withdraw From Term - Individual Enrollment Status for Withdrawal
property.description: The Individual Enrollment Status to be considered for withdrawal in semi-colon separated value e.g., Enrolled;Enrollment Requested;Withdrawal Requested.

property.name: showEnrollmentFinalizationButton
property.label: Show Enrollment Finalization Button
property.description: Show enrollment finalization button.

property.name: enrollmentFinalizationMode
property.label: Enrollment Finalization Mode
property.description: Use custom screen flow or custom LWC component to handle the enrollment finalization. Supported options are: Launch Flow, Dispatch LWC Event.

property.name: enrollmentFinalizationFlowName
property.label: Enrollment Finalization Flow Name
property.description: The API name for the screen flow to handle the enrollment finalization.

property.name: requestAttemptMax
property.label: Retry Attempt
property.description: The maximum retry attempt for enrollment request.

property.name: requestAttemptWaitingTime
property.label: Retry Waiting Time (Sec)
property.description: The incremental time for each retry attempt in seconds.

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.

property.name: requirementDescriptionField
property.label: (Obsolete) Requirement Description Field
property.description: This is obsolete.
